last_calcint_date_1.text: ย้อนหลังถึงวันที่

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , '!last_calcint_date_1!' as last_calcint_date_1 , '!last_calcint_date_2!' as last_calcint_date_2 , current_date from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date = '!last_calcint_date_2!' or sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_process_date < '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
